About

Kolton Post & K-Premium

K-Premium Mobile Detailing is Kolton Post’s passion turned profession. Every job — from a daily driver to a Porsche 911 to a lake boat — gets the same obsessive attention to detail. We bring the detail shop to you, using premium products and proven techniques to deliver results that speak for themselves.

Mobile Service — We Come to YouYour driveway, your dock, your schedule. No drop-offs, no waiting rooms.
Premium Products & TechniquesProfessional-grade supplies on every single job.
Small Business, Big StandardsKolton handles every job personally. You’re not a number.
Price Match GuaranteeWe beat other shops’ prices on boat services — see for yourself.
Call 314-835-7719
